name: [BUG-004] Cards do not support due_date field
description:
Expected: POST /api/boards/{id}/cards accepts due_date and returns it.
        Actual:   due_date field is silently ignored and not stored.
descriptionHtml:
Expected: POST /api/boards/{id}/cards accepts due_date and returns it.
    Actual:   due_date field is silently ignored and not stored.
statusMessage:
XFAIL BUG-004: Card has no due_date field

AssertionError: due_date field not supported — cards have no deadline tracking
assert ('due_date' in {'board_id': 3, 'column': 'Backlog', 'created_at': '2026-05-18T08:54:30.060182', 'creator_id': 2, ...})

labels.name: tag
labels.value: @pytest.mark.xfail(strict=True, reason='BUG-004: Card has no due_date field')

tags: @pytest.mark.xfail(strict=True, reason='BUG-004: Card has no due_date field')
